description: This file defines a Swipe utility class for handling swipe gestures in a web application, including event handling for touch and pointer events, and callbacks for swipe directions.

classes.name: Swipe
classes.description: A class that manages swipe gesture detection and callback execution for touch and pointer events.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Removes event listeners associated with the swipe instance.

methods.name: _start
methods.description: Handles the start of a swipe gesture, initializing deltaX based on the event.

methods.name: _end
methods.description: Handles the end of a swipe gesture, calculates swipe direction, and executes the corresponding callback.

methods.name: _move
methods.description: Handles movement during a swipe, updating deltaX.

methods.name: _handleSwipe
methods.description: Determines swipe direction and triggers the appropriate callback.

methods.name: _initEvents
methods.description: Initializes event listeners for touch and pointer events.

methods.name: _eventIsPointerPenTouch
methods.description: Checks if the event is a pointer pen or touch event.

methods.name: isSupported
methods.description: Static method to check if touch or pointer events are supported in the environment.
